heightRequirements.help: Manage the usual height rules in one block. Every field is optional: leave it empty to remove the rule.

localizedContent.title: Import entity JSON
localizedContent.subtitle: Choose an existing entity, then apply a partial or complete JSON payload to the supported fields.

selection.title: 1. Select the target
selection.description: Selection uses readable search results so you do not update an entity from a technical ID alone.
selection.empty: Run a search to display available targets.

editor.title: 2. Paste JSON
editor.description: The JSON is validated by the API and applied through the Application layer.

help.title: Accepted format
help.merge: By default, provided languages are merged with existing values: other languages are preserved.
help.replace: Add "replaceExisting": true or "mode": "replace" to fully replace the localized field.
help.fields: Supported fields: descriptions, names, description, biography, altTexts, captions, credits, labels depending on the selected type.
help.accessConditions: For an attraction park item, accessConditions can create or update conditions: type, implicit customTypeKey for an unknown type, value, unit, requiresAccompaniment, minimumCompanionAge, displayOrder, label and description.

entityHints.parkItem: Localized item description, with access conditions for attractions.
entityHints.image: Localized alternative texts, captions and credits.
entityHints.accessConditionType: Reusable catalogue of access condition types.

jsonImport.title: Import data for this entity
jsonImport.description: Paste a partial or complete JSON payload to quickly fill supported fields, without managing photos or creating child entities.
jsonImport.disabledUntilSave: Save this entity before importing JSON.

messages.success: JSON applied. Reload or check the tabs if needed.

help.title: Accepted format
help.partial: A partial JSON only updates the fields it contains.
help.merge: Localized values are merged by language, unless replaceExisting or mode: replace is used.
help.accessConditions: For park items, accessConditions can create or update conditions and their reusable types.

parkGraphUpserts.title: Park JSON upsert
parkGraphUpserts.subtitle: Paste a full or partial park JSON, preview the changes, then apply them without overwriting absent fields.

mission.title: Find the right park faster
mission.subtitle: The product starts with a solid portfolio, then grows toward richer discovery and decision tools.

discover.title: Reliable park pages
discover.text: Each park page centralizes location, items, photos, nearby parks and useful references.

explore.title: A map-first mindset
explore.text: Search, map interactions and nearby distances are designed as reusable foundations.

enjoy.title: A coherent visual identity
enjoy.text: Public, auth and profile pages now share the same tokens, surfaces and components.

clean.title: Built to evolve step by step
clean.text: The project is designed to add maps, comparisons and trip planning without disrupting the visitor experience.

cookieConsent.title: Cookies and privacy
cookieConsent.text: AmusementPark uses cookies or storage that are necessary for the website to work, including security, session, language, theme and authentication. With your agreement, the website also enables optional Matomo audience measurement cookies.

privacyPage.title: Privacy policy
privacyPage.lead: This page explains how AmusementPark processes personal data, necessary cookies, Google OAuth authentication and Matomo audience measurement.

consent.title: Manage optional cookies
consent.text: Cookies that are necessary for operation and authentication may be used without consent. Here you can accept, refuse or show again the choice for optional audience measurement cookies.

controller.title: Data controller
controller.body1: The data controller is Cédric Caudron, publisher of the AmusementPark website.
controller.body2: For any personal-data request, you can use the contact methods published on cedric-caudron.com.

data.title: Processed data
data.body1: The website may process account data needed for the service: email address, provided first or last name, avatar, preferred language and profile settings.
data.body2: Technical data may also be processed: IP address, date, viewed URL, browser, error logs and security information strictly useful for operation.

purposes.title: Purposes and legal bases
purposes.body1: Data is used to provide website features, secure access, manage accounts, display public content and administer the project.
purposes.body2: Processing required for operation relies on service performance or legitimate interest. Optional Matomo audience measurement cookies rely on your consent unless a strictly exempt configuration is later implemented.

analytics.title: Matomo audience measurement
analytics.body1: The website uses a self-hosted Matomo instance available at matomo.cedric-caudron.com with site ID 4.
analytics.body2: Matomo may measure visited pages, navigation sequences, traffic sources, device type and technical browser information.
analytics.body3: No third-party advertising tracking is added by this integration. Profile-related journeys may be measured only after optional-cookie consent, without sending private profile content as analytics events.

cookies.title: Cookies and local storage
cookies.body1: Strictly necessary cookies or storage may be used for session, security, language, theme, interface preferences and proper authentication behavior.
cookies.body2: These necessary trackers may include session/API cookies, HTTP-only authentication cookies, anti-abuse mechanisms and locally stored preferences. They cannot be disabled from the banner because they condition the requested service.
cookies.body3: The optional-cookie choice is stored in browser local storage so the same choice is not requested on every page.

hosting.title: Hosting and processors
hosting.body1: The website is intended to be hosted on a server located in France via Hostinger. Project technical services, including MongoDB, MinIO and Matomo, may run on this VPS.
hosting.body2: Data is not sold to advertisers. It may be processed by technical providers strictly required for hosting, security and operation.

retention.title: Retention periods
retention.body1: Accounts are kept while the account exists or while a limited security obligation requires retention.
retention.body2: Technical logs are kept for a period proportionate to security and diagnostics. Matomo data must be configured with a limited period and reviewed regularly.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body1: You can request access, rectification, erasure, restriction or objection for applicable processing of your data.
rights.body2: You can also withdraw analytics consent on this page and, if needed, lodge a complaint with the CNIL.

thirdPartyCookies.title: Third-party cookies and Google authentication
thirdPartyCookies.body1: The website offers Google OAuth / Sign in with Google. When you use this method, Google may place or read its own cookies and similar technologies for authentication, security, fraud prevention and session maintenance.
thirdPartyCookies.body2: These third-party trackers are necessary for the Google authentication requested by the user and are not controlled by the website’s Matomo/analytics consent.
thirdPartyCookies.body3: Refusing AmusementPark optional cookies does not block authentication. However, a browser that blocks some third-party cookies may prevent or degrade Google sign-in.

notFound.title: This page took the wrong turn
notFound.description: The page you requested does not exist, moved, or is not publicly available.
